headline: US rig count up two as prices climb
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was unchanged this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 241 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 301 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up two from last week at 553 rigs. A year ago, 592 rigs were active. The count shows that 412 rigs sought oil, up one from the previous week, and 133 explored for ...

headline: Assessing Baker Hughes (BKR) After Recent Pullback And Strong Multi Year Gain
summary: If you are wondering whether Baker Hughes shares still offer value after a strong multi year run, a closer look at what you are paying for each dollar of fundamentals can help frame the opportunity and the risks. The stock recently closed at US$54.26, with returns of 15.1% year to date and 29.2% over the last year. However, the past week and month saw setbacks of 9.3% and 11.4% respectively, which may have shifted sentiment and risk perception. Recent news coverage has focused on Baker...
